slides.heading: Moving between folders
slides.body:
**`cd`** changes your working directory.

**`pwd`** confirms where you are.

**`cd ..`** climbs one level toward `/`.
bullets: You built `projects` last step — it's still under `/home/student/projects`

slides.heading: Practice path
slides.body:
```bash
cd projects
pwd
cd ..
cd projects
```

Finish with your current directory **`/home/student/projects`** (check with `pwd`).
